project_common.art_style: 8-bit pixel art, retro minimalist aesthetic inspired by Google Chrome offline game
project_common.rendering: pixel perfect rendering with no anti-aliasing

shared_attributes.style: 8-bit pixel art with sharp, dangerous silhouette
shared_attributes.shading: flat color, no gradients or shading
shared_attributes.movement: scrolls left at current game speed

context.role: Ground obstacle requiring player to jump
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=650px (screen_width + 50), y=0px (ground level), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: Most common obstacle, appears from game start, requires basic jump timing to avoid

visual_specification.shape: Single vertical cactus with spiky protrusions, classic saguaro cactus silhouette
visual_specification.texture: solid pixel art, no texture patterns
visual_specification.details: Vertical columnar shape with 4-6 horizontal spikes protruding from sides, rounded top, clear dangerous silhouette

relationships.shared_with: Same color and style as cactus_medium and cactus_large
relationships.differences_from: cactus_medium is 68x70px (2 cacti), cactus_large is 102x100px (3 cacti and taller)

explicit_negations: No flowers, fruits, or decorative elements
